title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. monticola
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. monticola, also known as the mountain eye-bright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to mountainous regions in Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. monticola include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes and mucous membranes, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Euphrasia officinalis subsp. monticola is typically prepared as an herbal tincture, eye drops, or salve, making it a popular remedy for eye health issues and respiratory problems.
